MEMO OF PA ISO RECONSIDERATION (TRANSACTION ID # 100056729) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VASQUEZ, MARIA DEL RAYO
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-10-2019 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF MARIA VASQUEZ'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION IS GRANTED PER STIPULATION OF PARTIES. THE ORDER SUSTAINING DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND IS VACATED, AND DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER WILL BE REHEARD ON JANUARY 28, 2019. PER STIPULATION, PLAINTIFF WILL FILE AN OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER NO LATER THAN JANUARY 10, 2019. DEFENDANTS WILL FILE A REPLY, IF ANY, NO LATER THAN JANUARY 17, 2019. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES, CLERK: N. WONG, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER; MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. AS TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION PLAINTIFF SHALL ALLEGE FACTS GIVING RISE TO A DUTY TO INFORM THE PLAINTIFF TO DEFENDANT'S APPARENTLY SPONTANEOUS DECISION TO REVIEW AND APPROVE PLAINTIFF FOR HAMP 3 YEARS AFTER PLAINTIFF'S LAST APPLICATION FOR MODIFICATION HAD BEEN SUBMITTED. AS TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION BASED ON VIOLATION OF 12 CFR 1024.41(B) AND (C) TO THE EXTENT PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT IS BASED ON THE 2013 APPLICATION, IT IS BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS AND DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED. CFR PROVIDES STRICT DEADLINES FOR LENDER'S COMPLIANCE, ALL OF WHICH HAVE PASSED IN 2013. TO THE EXTENT THIS CAUSE OF ACTION IS BASED ON SOME LATER APPLICATION ON WHICH LENDER FAILED TO COMMUNICATE OR EXERCISE DILIGENCE, PLAINTIFF FAILS TO ALLEGE ANY FACTS TO THAT EFFECT. PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE A 10 DAY LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE SUCH FACTS, IF SUCH ALLEGATIONS MAY BE MADE IN GOOD FAITH. AS TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR UCL VIOLATION DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE UNFAIR, ILLEGAL, OR FRAUDULENT ACT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC3.1312(B). JUDGE CHARLES F. HAINES, CLERK: N. WONG, NOT REPORTED (D501)

Defendant'S Demurrer; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Feb-06-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant'S Demurrer; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities is SUSTAINED with leave to amend. As to the cause of action Plaintiff shall allege facts giving rise to a duty to inform the Plaintiff to Defendant's apparently spontaneous decision to review and approve Plaintiff for HAMP 3 years after Plaintiff's last application for modification had been submitted.
As to the cause of action based on violation of 12 CFR 1024.41(b) and (c) to the extent Plaintiff's complaint is based on the 2013 application, it is barred by the Statute of Limitations and demurrer is sustained. CFR provides strict deadlines for lender's compliance, all of which have passed in 2013. To the extent this cause of action is based on some later application on which lender failed to communicate or exercise diligence, Plaintiff fails to allege any facts to that effect. Plaintiff shall have a 10 day leave to amend to allege such facts, if such allegations may be made in good faith. As to the cause of action for UCL violation demurrer is sustained with leave to amend to allege unfair, illegal, or fraudulent act. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

Off Calendar Jan-10-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MARIA VASQUEZ's Motion For Reconsideration is GRANTED per stipulation of parties. The Order Sustaining Defendants' Demurrer without leave to amend is vacated, and Defendants' Demurrer will be reheard on January 28, 2019. Per stipulation, Plaintiff will file an opposition to Defendants' Demurrer no later than January 10, 2019. Defendants will file a reply, if any, no later than January 17, 2019. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not Reported. (D501)
